mod_logChannelNotFound:
{{cross}} The configured log channel was not found.
Use `/module setup` to configure it.
mod_noMutedRole:
{{cross}} No muted role has been configured.
Use `/module setup` to configure it.
mod_mutedRoleNotFound:
{{cross}} The configured muted role was not found.
Use `/module setup` to configure it.
mod_notManageable: {{cross}} I cannot moderate this member. My highest role might be below theirs.
mod_hierarchy: {{cross}} You cannot moderate this member because they have a higher or equal role than you.
mod_invalidDuration: {{cross}} Invalid duration. Use: `1d`, `2h`, `30m`, or combined like `1d2h30m`.
